caption: The video depicts a presentation in a classroom or lecture setting. A woman stands on the left side of the frame, holding a tablet and gesturing as she speaks. She is dressed in a black blazer over a white shirt with some text on it. Behind her, a large projection screen displays an image with the text "data as a deluge" accompanied by a dramatic painting of turbulent waves crashing against rocks. The audience includes at least one person visible in the foreground, wearing a green beanie and a light-colored jacket, who appears to be attentively watching the presentation. The room has a simple setup with a few chairs and a small table on the right side, suggesting an informal yet focused learning environment.
